text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Formulary research files. The guide 
includes several ways for users to quickly find the information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS variable names 
• Individual entries for each
